steps.title: Compare both authors
steps.content: Text 1 says Chen took a crucial step that Haddad did not: separating plant root systems while allowing mycorrhizal strands through. Text 2 argues that even Chen's barriers still leave other pathways possible.

steps.title: Find the shared answer
steps.content: Choice A would divide the authors because Text 1 is more favorable to Chen's barriers than Text 2. Choice B asks whether Haddad excluded other pathways; both texts imply no. Choice C is not addressed. Choice D is only raised by Text 2. The answer is B.
